## One CLI for image, video, and audio

The [Picsart CLI](https://picsart.com/cli/) brings image, video, and audio generation straight to your terminal. One install gives you access to 130+ leading AI models across all three media types - including Flux, Recraft, Nano Banana, Sora, Kling, Veo, Runway, and ElevenLabs. Drop it into any shell, CI pipeline, or Dockerfile and start creating instantly.

[Explore the CLI](https://picsart.com/cli/)

I’ve been using this program for years and love it! It’s always growing and improving. If you are looking for a photo editor to play around with or a little something extra for your business I would highly recommend giving this one a try!

demographic information (gender, age, and preferred language)\\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003cli\\u003eimages I may post to Picsart and metadata linked to this content (comments, or a geotag)\\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003cli\\u003eimage spatial positioning data from the iOS TrueDepth API \\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003cli\\u003e3D face scan data\\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003cli\\u003emy device's contact list\\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003cli\\u003einformation from Facebook, Instagram, or other third-party accounts (such as my username, friends, or contacts) that I have connected to Picsart\\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003c/ul\\u003e\\n ---\\n \\u003cul\\u003e\\n Period of retention and use:\\n \\u003cli\\u003e\\n \\u003cstrong\\u003e\\n \\u003cu\\u003e\\n Until I delete my Picsart account, unless Picsart is otherwise required by law to retain it.\\n \\u003c/u\\u003e\\n \\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n I also consent to\\n \\u003cstrong\\u003e\\n \\u003cu\\u003e\\n Picsart’s retention of some of this personal data after my Picsart account is deleted for certain legitimate business reasons, specified in the section entitled “Data Retention and Deletion” of the Privacy Policy, linked below, for up to three years and indefinitely for a small subset of this data. \\n \\u003c/u\\u003e\\n \\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n \\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003cli\\u003e\\n I consent to Picsart’s retention of my device's contact list and information from Facebook, Instagram, or other third-party accounts that I have connected to Picsart \\n \\u003cstrong\\u003e\\u003cu\\u003euntil I either change my selections and settings or delete my Picsart account, unless Picsart is otherwise required by law to retain it. \\u003c/u\\u003e\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n \\u003c/li\\u003e\\n \\u003c/ul\\u003e\\n ---\\n \\u003cul\\u003e\\n The fact that the data subjects have the right to refuse to provide consent and the details of disadvantages, if any, that can result from such refusal:\\n \\u003cli\\u003eI understand that if I refuse to consent, I may not be able to use the above functions and services normally.\\u003c/li\\u003e\\n
